title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Production Engineer for our Pune team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Motors Consulting Pvt Ltd!
